relationship.description: A class contains many students; each student belongs to one class
A major has many students; each student declares one major
A department enrolls many students; each student belongs to one department
Each class has one head teacher
A department oversees many classes; each class belongs to one department
A major can have many classes; each class is linked to one major
A department employs many teachers; each teacher belongs to one department
A department offers many majors; each major is under one department

metadata.improvements_made: Added explicit DEPARTMENT_ID attribute to STUDENT and a corresponding 1:N relationship (DEPARTMENT‑STUDENT). Clarified grade-related attributes by renaming to student_grade_level and teacher_rank. Included CLASS_CODE for unique class identification. Ensured all teacher personal fields (home_address, hire_date) are present. Retained normalized structure, head‑teacher 1:1 constraint, and all core entities and relationships. The model now fully reflects the domain description with improved completeness, accuracy, and clarity.
